news.title:
Balrampur Chini MD highlights ethanol's potential beyond fuel blending for cooking, industry.
India's biomass like sugarcane can scale ethanol production, aiding sugar industry and energy security.

news.title:
Balrampur Chini may shift production focus to sugar if prices rise.
Sugar price surge boosts Balrampur Chini's prospects in the market.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's ethanol push saves Rs 1.4L crore in crude imports, aiding Praj, Balrampur, Triveni.
Praj leads in bio-energy tech; Balrampur, Triveni benefit from sugar-ethanol integration amid policy challenges.
news.summary:
India's ethanol push saves Rs 1.4L crore in crude imports, aiding Praj, Balrampur, Triveni.
Praj leads in bio-energy tech; Balrampur, Triveni benefit from sugar-ethanol integration amid policy challenges.

news.title:
Sugar stocks like Balrampur Chini, Dhampur surged 6-10% amid broader sell-off.
Global sugar price rise due to US-Iran conflict; ethanol demand boosts market.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balrampur Chini forecasts ₹2,000 cr annual revenue for its PLA unit at full capacity.
India's first industrial-scale bio-based PLA unit launches in UP this October.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balrampur Chini Mills signed a deal with Lucknow Cantonment Board for compostable PLA products.
This marks a significant development in India's bio-based materials sector.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balrampur Chini Mills announces Rs. 3.50 interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Dividend unpaid due to incorrect bank details; shareholders asked to update KYC with RTA.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balrampur Chini Mills' sugar segment performed well despite higher sugarcane prices, with crushing up 8.4%.
Gross sugar recovery improved slightly; Rs.1421 cr spent on PLA project by Jan 26.
news.summary:

news.title: Balrampur Chini Mills' Q3 revenue rose to ₹14.5B from ₹11.9B YoY.

news.title:
Balrampur Chini Mills schedules an earnings call for Q3/9M FY26 results on Feb 11, 2026, at 12:00 PM IST.
The session will include a management discussion and Q&A; recordings will be available on their website post-call.
news.summary:
Balrampur Chini Mills schedules an earnings call for Q3/9M FY26 results on Feb 11, 2026, at 12:00 PM IST.
The session will include a management discussion and Q&A; recordings will be available on their website post-call.

news.title:
Balrampur Chini priced at Rs 471.95 shows short-term gain but 10.9% YTD return signals long-term underperformance.
Positive short-term indicators overshadowed by declining profits and flat long-term growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balrampur Chini forecasts 31 MT sugar output post-ethanol diversion, 28.5 MT domestic use.
1.5 MT sugar export allowed; INR 1093 Cr invested in PLA bioplastic project, interim dividend declared.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sugar stocks like Balrampur Chini, Dhampur Sugar, and Dwarikesh Sugar focus as govt allows 1.5M tonnes export for 2025-26 season.
Food Ministry removes 50% molasses export duty to aid liquidity; sugar stocks showed 5-10% decline in past month.
news.summary:
Sugar stocks like Balrampur Chini, Dhampur Sugar, and Dwarikesh Sugar focus as govt allows 1.5M tonnes export for 2025-26 season.
Food Ministry removes 50% molasses export duty to aid liquidity; sugar stocks showed 5-10% decline in past month.
